text: Jason Kidd out as coach of the Mavericks after 5 seasons - NBA

text: Trump-endorsed Ed Gallrein unseats Rep. Thomas Massie in Kentucky GOP primary - NBC News
fullText: Former Navy SEAL Ed Gallrein has won the Republican primary in Kentucky’s 4th Congressional District over Rep. Thomas Massie.

text: Andy Barr wins Kentucky GOP Senate primary - Politico
fullText: The Trump-endorsed representative defeated former Attorney General Daniel Cameron in the race to succeed Mitch McConnell.

text: Plex is tripling the price of a lifetime pass to $750 after doubling it last year - The Verge
fullText: Plex is giving every prospective customer until July 1st to lock in a lifetime subscription at today’s rates — before it triples the price to a staggering $750.

text: As Putin visits China, distrust simmers beneath an anti-U.S. alliance - The Washington Post
fullText: Back-to-back visits to Beijing by the American and Russian presidents are highlighting how China's Xi Jinping is the world leader to be reckoned with and courted.

text: NAACP calls on Black athletes to pause on southern schools over voting rights. - NBC News
